Advanced Partnership Development with BOK Financial by Hosting A Leadership Immersion Visit

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Advanced partnership development with BOK Financial by hosting a leadership immersion visit at ASU and sharing a comprehensive opportunities proposal across W. P. Carey, AZPBS, President’s Club, and the Change the World campaign. BOK identified customized student engagement events as an initial f...
